productDisplayName: Puma Men Ftpa Quarters Black Socks
description: Pack of two pairs of ankle length socks in black and greyMade of 70% cotton, 29% nylon and 1% elastaneBranded rib at opening to grip above ankleThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitThese socks will be just as at home with your office attire as with your Sports kit.  puma ensure that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Sock careMachine wash in warm waterDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
